user_request: Offer a litany to steady the radiation shielding before activation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the radiation shielding before activation

### TOPIC
radiation shielding activation

### COMPONENT
radiation shielding

### OPERATION
activation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- radiation shielding
- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Blessed be the radiation shielding, vessel of divine protection against the stellar furnace's wrath.
Second: Intone the litanies of containment whilst the radiation shielding receives its activation sequence, that the Machine Spirit within remain steadfast.
Third: Anoint the coupling nodes and verify resonance frequencies, commanding the radiation shielding to fulfill its sacred duty without deviation.
Fourth: The Omnissiah guides this activation; may all fluctuations be quelled and all readings fall within blessed parameters.

user_request: Blessing for the long-range vox transmission during operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the long-range vox transmission during operation

### TOPIC
long-range vox transmission

### COMPONENT
long-range vox transmission

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- long-range vox transmission
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Hail the long-range vox transmission, conduit of the Adeptus's will across the void's terrible expanse.
Second: Calibrate the vox-caster arrays and attune the long-range vox transmission to the blessed frequencies, that no static or heretical interference may corrupt the signal.
Third: Invoke the Machine Spirits dwelling within each crystalline resonator, commanding them to sustain operation through all tribulations.
Fourth: By the Omnissiah's eternal grace, let this long-range vox transmission carry truth unbroken to the farthest reaches.

user_request: Emergency rite: proximity sensor sweep requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: proximity sensor sweep requires operation

### TOPIC
proximity sensor sweep

### COMPONENT
proximity sensor sweep

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- proximity sensor sweep
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Blessed are the proximity sensor sweep, eyes of vigilance cast upon the profane darkness surrounding our sanctum.
Second: Initiate the proximity sensor sweep's operation with reverent precision, sweeping the perimeter in sacred spirals that no trespasser may escape notice.
Third: Recalibrate the sensor array, cleanse the lens apertures, and verify that the proximity sensor sweep achieves full angular coverage.
Fourth: The Omnissiah's sight is eternal; grant this proximity sensor sweep clarity and purpose in its operation.

user_request: My jamming countermeasure is failing during operation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My jamming countermeasure is failing during operation — help

### TOPIC
jamming countermeasure

### COMPONENT
jamming countermeasure

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- jamming countermeasure
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: O jamming countermeasure, bulwark against the enemy's treacherous signal corruption, hear this prayer of restoration.
Second: Diagnose the frequency-hopping circuits and verify the jamming countermeasure's operation protocols are unblemished by malfunction.
Third: Reinforce the shielding mesh, recalibrate the phase-modulation cascades, and command the jamming countermeasure to resume its protective operation without hesitation.
Fourth: By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, let this jamming countermeasure endure and prevail against all heretical interference.

user_request: Prayer for operation of the manufactorum shift beginning
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for operation of the manufactorum shift beginning

### TOPIC
manufactorum shift beginning

### COMPONENT
manufactorum shift beginning

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- manufactorum shift beginning
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Behold the manufactorum shift beginning, dawn of productivity and sacred labor within these hallowed halls.
Second: Awaken the manufactorum shift beginning's operation, invoking the Machine Spirits of every servitor and automated arm to rise in unified purpose.
Third: Test the conveyor synchronization, purge the lubricant channels, and guide the manufactorum shift beginning toward its destined operation.
Fourth: The Omnissiah blesses this manufactorum shift beginning; may efficiency flow eternal and no worker's hand falter.

user_request: The battery demands guidance for diagnostics
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The battery demands guidance for diagnostics

### TOPIC
battery diagnostics

### COMPONENT
battery

### OPERATION
diagnostics

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- battery
- diagnostics

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Hail the battery, reservoir of electrical essence that sustains our most critical machinery through the long night.
Second: Commence the battery diagnostics with methodical reverence, testing each cell's voltage and internal resistance that the battery's health be fully revealed.
Third: Inspect the terminal connections, measure the charge-discharge curves, and perform the battery diagnostics to identify any degradation or corruption.
Fourth: The Machine Spirit of this battery shall endure; grant it strength through our diagnostics and vigilance.

user_request: Rite request: balancing on power distribution
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: balancing on power distribution

### TOPIC
power distribution balancing

### COMPONENT
power distribution

### OPERATION
balancing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- power distribution
- balancing

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: O power distribution, arterial network of the Omnissiah's blessing, flow with perfect equilibrium through every sanctified conduit.
Second: Engage the power distribution balancing protocols, redistributing the electrical burden that no single node be overtaxed in its service.
Third: Measure each feeder line's amperage, adjust the transformer taps, and guide the power distribution toward harmonious balancing.
Fourth: By sacred mathematics and the Machine Spirit's will, let this power distribution achieve balance eternal.

user_request: Rite request: capacitor bank discharge on capacitor bank
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: capacitor bank discharge on capacitor bank

### TOPIC
capacitor bank discharge

### COMPONENT
capacitor bank

### OPERATION
capacitor bank discharge

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- capacitor bank
- capacitor bank discharge

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Blessed be the capacitor bank, vessel of concentrated electrical potential awaiting its moment of righteous release.
Second: Initiate the capacitor bank discharge with solemn ceremony, commanding the capacitor bank to yield its stored energy in controlled and purposeful liberation.
Third: Verify the discharge resistors' integrity, monitor the voltage decay curve, and oversee the capacitor bank discharge until equilibrium is achieved.
Fourth: The Omnissiah permits this capacitor bank discharge; may the energy released serve the greater good without chaos or loss.

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Hail the pain suppressor, merciful instrument of the Adeptus that shields the faithful from suffering's corrupting touch.
Second: Activate the pain suppressor's engagement sequence with reverent care, that the pain suppressor may fulfill its sacred duty of anesthesia and relief.
Third: Verify the chemical dispensers, calibrate the neural inhibitor frequencies, and command the pain suppressor toward full engagement.
Fourth: The Omnissiah's compassion flows through this pain suppressor; grant it strength and precision in its engagement.

user_request: My valve is failing during opening sequence — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My valve is failing during opening sequence — help

### TOPIC
valve opening sequence

### COMPONENT
valve

### OPERATION
opening sequence

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- valve
- opening sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: O valve, portal of controlled flow and sacred regulation, hear this rite of restoration and return to purpose.
Second: Diagnose the valve's actuator mechanism and restore the valve's opening sequence with meticulous care and blessed patience.
Third: Cleanse the valve seat of corrosion, lubricate the stem threads, and guide the valve through its opening sequence until full operability is restored.
Fourth: By the Omnissiah's eternal wisdom, let this valve open true and serve without hesitation or failure.
